name: io.github.rom-baro/arcwall-security
description: Security scanning for Claude Code, Cursor, Windsurf and any MCP-compatible AI coding tool. Detects secrets, scans MCP configs, agent instructions, generates threat models, and runs pre-commit security checks.

environmentVariables.name: ARCWALL_API_KEY
environmentVariables.description: Your Arcwall API key from arcwall.io/app.html
